    Index

    A B C D E F G H I M N O P R S T U V W 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    S

    setPosition(Position) - Method in class core.Piece
    Updates the piece's coordinate and permanently flags it as having moved.
    shoot(Position, Board) - Method in interface core.Shootable
    Executes a ranged attack aimed at a specific board coordinate.
    shoot(Position, Board) - Method in class pieces.Archer
    Executes a ranged attack on a target position.
    shoot(Position, Board) - Method in class pieces.Archmage
    Executes the infinite-range magic attack on a designated target position.
    shoot(Position, Board) - Method in class pieces.Mage
    Executes a ranged attack on a designated target position.
    shoot(Position, Position) - Method in class core.GameEngine
    Executes a ranged attack if the acting piece implements Shootable.
    Shootable - Interface in core
    Defines the contract for any piece capable of executing ranged attacks within the Kuroshiro engine.
    stab(Position, Board) - Method in interface core.Stabbable
    Executes a melee attack aimed at a specific board coordinate.
    stab(Position, Board) - Method in class pieces.Assassin
    Executes a melee attack on a designated target position.
    stab(Position, Board) - Method in class pieces.Dragon
    Executes a melee attack on a designated target position.
    stab(Position, Board) - Method in class pieces.Warrior
    Executes a melee attack on a designated target position.
    stab(Position, Position) - Method in class core.GameEngine
    Executes a melee action if the acting piece implements Stabbable.
    Stabbable - Interface in core
    Defines the contract for any piece capable of executing close-range melee attacks within the Kuroshiro engine.
    start(Stage) - Method in class ui.ChessApp
    The main entry point for the JavaFX application lifecycle.
    success(Piece, boolean) - Static method in class core.MoveResult
    Static factory method to generate a successful move outcome.
    SUCCESS - Enum constant in enum class core.MoveResult.Status
    The action was validated and executed successfully.
